/usr/lib/ccache/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dumme_msgs/srv/detail/euler_to_quaternion__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/dumme_msgs/srv/detail/quaternion_to_euler__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
